findings.expected: The visible UTC date input has a stable accessible name.
findings.actual: Both provider pages now use a visible UTC date label associated by for/id.
findings.missing_assertion: A cross-site permanent accessible-name gate is still absent.

findings.expected: The server-authored shell and selected control represent the same default layout that users receive.
findings.actual: HTML is authored as Split with Split pressed, then an inline script mutates the shell to Wide when no URL or storage preference exists.
findings.missing_assertion: No gate compares server-authored default layout, first painted state, stored state, and hydrated control state.

findings.expected: General Public Readiness enumerates every repository-owned public route.
findings.actual: providerPages() includes heatmap, day-flow, battle-lines, history, channel, and status but omits Watchlist.
findings.missing_assertion: Public Readiness does not require both Watchlist routes.

findings.expected: General Production Smoke owns every appropriate public route group.
findings.actual: The workflow route array covers portal and primary provider feature/status routes but omits the listed route groups.
findings.missing_assertion: No unified production route ownership assertion exists.

findings.expected: The no-id state presents one clear provider-safe route back to a place where a channel can be selected, without pretending data loaded.
findings.actual: The feedback is plain text while normal task tabs, period controls, copy actions, and empty analysis panels remain visible.
findings.missing_assertion: No browser gate requires a focused no-id entry task and suppresses irrelevant controls.

findings.state: real or deterministic fixture with distinct primary and recommended pairs
findings.expected: The default pair, Back to recommended action, Recommended battle label, chart, and inspector use one explicit recommendation owner.
findings.actual: The payload defines both primaryBattle and recommendedBattle, but default selection, the Back to recommended action, and recommended labeling all use primaryBattle.
existing_gates: Battle Lines Wide and Split layout contract
findings.missing_assertion: No fixture supplies distinct primaryBattle and recommendedBattle values and requires UI agreement.

findings.expected: Primary summary, chart cursor, Time Inspector, URL point state, and coverage use the same selected bucket.
findings.actual: Shared selectedIndex drives those surfaces and metric/bucket refresh attempts to preserve the selected bucket, but no cross-surface browser evidence is permanent.
existing_gates: Battle Lines Wide and Split layout contract
findings.missing_assertion: No browser fixture proves initial latest selection and keyboard/pointer changes remain coherent across all selected-time surfaces.

findings.expected: Applicable mobile controls are at least 44px and important management or publishing actions are at least 48px.
findings.actual: P8B recorded 34–42px controls; U10A must remeasure the current candidate before repair.
findings.missing_assertion: No all-route target-size evidence artifact exists.
